==============================================================================================================
CONTEXT function installMainStyles
// lines 1968-2168
01968: 
01969:     function normaliseMissingRequirementText(value) {
01970:         if (value === undefined || value === null) return '';
01971:         if (typeof value === 'object') return formatMissingRequirementObject(value) || missingRequirementValueText(value);
01972: 
01973:         let text = decodeMissionTextEntities(value)
01974:         .replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi, ' ')
01975:         .replace(/<[^>]*>/g, ' ')
01976:         .replace(/\\[nrt]/g, ' ')
01977:         .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
01978:         .trim();
01979:         if (!text) return '';
01980: 
01981:         // MissionChief can expose the requirement payload as JSON, escaped JSON,
01982:         // or occasionally as a key/value fragment without its opening brace.
01983:         for (let pass = 0; pass < 3; pass += 1) {
01984:         let candidate = text;
01985:         if (!candidate.startsWith('{') && /^(?:["']?[a-z][\w -]*["']?)\s*:/i.test(candidate)) candidate = `{${candidate}`;
01986:         if (candidate.startsWith('{') && !candidate.endsWith('}')) candidate += '}';
01987:         try {
01988:             const parsed = JSON.parse(candidate);
01989:             if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object') return formatMissingRequirementObject(parsed) || missingRequirementValueText(parsed);
01990:             if (typeof parsed === 'string' && parsed.trim() && parsed.trim() !== text) {
01991:                 text = parsed.trim();
01992:                 continue;
01993:             }
01994:         } catch (err) {}
01995:         break;
01996:         }
01997: 
01998:         // Fallback for malformed but still recognisable object fragments.
01999:         const parsedPairs = {};
02000:         const pairPattern = /["']?([a-z][\w -]*)["']?\s*:\s*(?:"([^"]*)"|'([^']*)'|([^,}\]]+))/gi;
02001:         let match;
02002:         while ((match = pairPattern.exec(text))) {
02003:         const key = match[1];
02004:         const pairValue = match[2] ?? match[3] ?? match[4] ?? '';
02005:         parsedPairs[key] = pairValue;
02006:         }
02007:         if (Object.keys(parsedPairs).length) {
02008:         const formatted = formatMissingRequirementObject(parsedPairs);
02009:         if (formatted) return formatted;
02010:         }
02011: 
02012:         return text.replace(/^[{\[]+|[}\]]+$/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
02013:     }
02014: 
02015:     function removeOldInstances() {
02016:         document.querySelectorAll(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}, #${SCRIPT.panelId}, #${SCRIPT.toastId}, #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}, #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}, #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}, #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}, #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId}, #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}, #${SCRIPT.oldControlId}, #${SCRIPT.cleanExitId}, #${SCRIPT.oldGeoLabelLayerId}`)
02017:         .forEach(el => el.remove());
02018: 
02019:         document.querySelectorAll('style').forEach(style => {
02020:         const text = style.textContent || '';
02021:         if (style.id.startsWith('mc-map-command-') || (text.includes('mcms-') && text.includes('data-mc-map-skin'))) {
02022:             style.remove();
02023:         }
02024:         });
02025:     }
02026: 
02027:     function addStyle(css) {
02028:         const style = document.createElement('style');
02029:         style.id = SCRIPT.styleId;
02030:         style.textContent = css;
02031:         const parent = document.head || document.documentElement;
02032:         if (parent) parent.appendChild(style);
02033:         else document.addEventListener('readystatechange', () => (document.head || document.documentElement)?.appendChild(style), { once: true });
02034:     }
02035: 
02036:     let mainStylesInstalled = false;
02037: 
02038:     function installMainStyles() {
02039:         if (mainStylesInstalled && document.getElementById(SCRIPT.styleId)) return;
02040:         const styleStartedAt = startupClock();
02041:         mainStylesInstalled = true;
02042:         addStyle(`
